response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum (~19 years) and shows genuine builder fluency across web, embedded, and infrastructure work, plus entrepreneurial experience founding an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume tops out at Staff-level product engineering. AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure) rather than recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products or platforms, and there is no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at the level this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source platform with real-world adoption
Active in developer community with talks, workshops, and open-source libraries, indicating ability to share insights and mentor
concerns: No principal/director-level scope: career history is senior/staff IC delivery work, not organization-wide technical strategy
AI experience is shallow and recent (agent tooling since 2025), well short of 'recognized expertise' with demonstrated AI products
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of cloud platform strategy or customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Experience tenure and entrepreneurial builder profile
